# Session 4 notes

party split up. half went to the docks, half stayed in town.

dock half found Marra's warehouse with smugglers. fight. won. Marra grateful.
"i owe you one" — direct quote

town half talked to Sera, she's worried about Gundren still not back.

regrouped, headed out toward the mines. arrived at entrance just before time was up. not going in tonight.

next time: descend
